description_long: This is a muscular adult male dressed in tactical military attire, featuring a sleeveless vest with multiple pouches and a visible radio antenna on the back. He wears camouflage cargo pants with large pockets and sturdy combat boots, suitable for rugged urban or combat environments. His arms are bare, and he wears fingerless gloves, enhancing his grip and dexterity. A headband is wrapped around his forehead, keeping hair and sweat out of his eyes, and his hair is pulled back in a short ponytail. The overall appearance suggests readiness for action, with practical gear for carrying equipment and protection. The figure's stance is upright and alert, conveying a sense of vigilance and preparedness.
description: A muscular adult male in tactical military gear, including a vest with pouches, camouflage cargo pants, combat boots, gloves, and a headband, standing upright and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical vest with pouches, muscular arms, gloves, headband, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the vest, arm, and the side of the cargo pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest with a radio antenna, the back of the cargo pants, and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the vest, arm, and side of the pants and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical military vest, sleeveless shirt, cargo pants, fingerless gloves, and headband
attribute_hairstyle: short hair pulled back in a ponytail
